_meta.title: Get Item by ID — Single Resource Fetch

_observed: HTTP 200. Response body contains 'item' object. item.id = 1, which exactly matches the requested path parameter. item.name = 'Widget A' (string, non-null). item.description = 'First demo item' (string, non-null). item.in_stock = true (boolean, non-null). All four required fields present and non-null. Content-Type is application/json.
